conflict: The almost-crash collapses present time into the Hungarian accident with Klara, leaving Beni physically unable to keep driving without help.
consequence: Beni tells Noor the truth about the fatal affair and crash, bringing his origin wound into the living social world of the novel.
must_land_beats: Render the near-miss with sensory precision rather than action-movie speed.
Reveal the Klara affair and fatal crash in usable, draftable factual detail.
Make Noor's response practical, unsentimental, and humane.
End with Beni changed by having said the story aloud, even though nothing material is fixed yet.
objective: Finish an airport run after a near collision and hold onto the professional composure Beni builds his life around.
